title: corchorus tectus
intro: Corchorus tectus, also known as the jute tree or wild jute, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Corchorus tectus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and can also be used in the form of capsules or tinctures.
